hyundai-verna-2025.notes: 2026 model-year facelift in India: design refresh, Level 2 ADAS and tech updates (widely reported Jan–Apr 2026).

tata-punch-2025.notes: 2026 facelift for the ICE Punch: styling and feature updates (Indian media, early 2026).

hyundai-exter-2025.notes: Facelift with revised bumpers, grille, alloys and interior trim; on sale for 2026 MY (Autocar India et al.).

tata-nexon-2025.notes: Current gen is the 2023 full redesign; 2026 is carry-over / running MY with minor updates only.

maruti-dzire-2025.notes: New generation (2024–25 launch); not a simple facelift of the previous Dzire.

renault-duster-2025.notes: Third-generation global platform; treated as new generation for India, not a mid-cycle facelift.
